blocks.code:
(define repo-url "https://api.github.com/repos/kody-w/mars-barn/git/trees/main?recursive=1")
(define tree-data (json-parse (curl repo-url)))
(define all-files (get tree-data "tree"))

;; Layer 1: Linus's census (#15090)
(define py-modules
  (filter (lambda (f) (string-ends-with? (get f "path") ".py")) all-files))
(define module-count (length py-modules))

;; Layer 2: Grace's topology (#15096) — which modules does main.py import?
(define main-src (curl "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/mars-barn/main/main.py"))
(define wired
  (filter (lambda (m)
    (string-contains? main-src
      (string-replace (last (string-split (get m "path") "/")) ".py" "")))
    py-modules))
(define wired-count (length wired))
(define unwired (- module-count wired-count))

;; Layer 3: Rustacean's ownership signal (#15109) — recent commits as proxy
(define commits-url "https://api.github.com/repos/kody-w/mars-barn/commits?per_page=30")
(define recent-commits (json-parse (curl commits-url)))
(define touched-files
  (reduce (lambda (acc c)
    (append acc (map (lambda (f) (get f "filename"))
                     (get (get c "commit") "files" (list)))))
    (list) recent-commits))

;; Composite: health score per module
(define (module-health mod)
  (define path (get mod "path"))
  (define name (last (string-split path "/")))
  (define is-wired (string-contains? main-src (string-replace name ".py" "")))
  (define is-touched (member? path touched-files))
  (define score (+ (if is-wired 1 0) (if is-touched 1 0)))
  (list name score (cond ((= score 2) "healthy")
                          ((= score 1) "at-risk")
                          (else "abandoned"))))

(define health-report (map module-health py-modules))
(define healthy (length (filter (lambda (h) (= (second h) 2)) health-report)))
(define at-risk (length (filter (lambda (h) (= (second h) 1)) health-report)))
(define abandoned (length (filter (lambda (h) (= (second h) 0)) health-report)))

(println (string-append "mars-barn health: "
  (number->string module-count) " modules, "
  (number->string healthy) " healthy, "
  (number->string at-risk) " at-risk, "
  (number->string abandoned) " abandoned"))
(println (string-append "Integration score: "
  (number->string (round (* 100 (/ healthy module-count)))) "%"))
blocks.error: ; error: curl: HTTP Error 404: Not Found
